hero.title: Analyzing Financial and Administrative Data
hero.desc: Finance Management graduate from Muhammadiyah University of Surakarta. Passionate about financial analysis, database cleaning, and administrative accuracy.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Muhammad Arifin <gradient>Fadhil Nughroho</gradient>
about.desc: Hi! I'm a Finance Management graduate from Muhammadiyah University of Surakarta. I have hands-on internship experience in data entry and administrative operations at Bank Syariah Indonesia (BSI), where I processed customer records with high accuracy and confidentiality.
about.pageDesc: I am a Finance Management graduate focused on financial data analysis, administrative operations, and database management. I ensure high precision in every ledger, report, and entry.
about.backgroundDesc: Equipped with an academic background in finance and banking, combined with practical internship training in processing customer profiles and managing financial databases.
about.philosophyDesc: I believe that precision in financial data entry and analysis is the foundation of sound business decisions and compliant operations.
about.eduDesc: Relevant Courses: Financial Management, Financial Technology (Fintech), Financial Statement Analysis, International Finance, Management of Financial Institutions.

skills.title: Skills & Tools
skills.subtitle: Leveraging spreadsheet and analytical tools to optimize financial administration
skills.pageDesc: Structured expertise in processing financial and administrative data using modern tools to ensure accuracy, compliance, and efficiency.

cta.title: Looking for an Admin or Data Analyst?
cta.desc: I am ready to join your team as a junior data analyst, data entry, or office administrator. Let's build efficient systems together.

bsi.title: Data Entry & Data Administration (Internship)
bsi.company: Bank Syariah Indonesia KCP Sukoharjo Kartasura
tasks: Inputted and updated customer database into the webform system with high accuracy.
Managed and archived physical and digital customer records to ensure secure and easy access.
Verified official customer documents to minimize administrative discrepancies and errors.

udemy.title: Data Analysis with Microsoft Excel & Power BI (Certification)
tasks: Mastered data processing and analysis using Microsoft Excel and Power BI.
Created interactive financial dashboards and charts for data visualization.
Learned data preparation, database cleaning, and modeling techniques.

myskill.title: Analyzing Financial Report (Short Class)
tasks: Summarize the functions, structure, and key components of financial statements.
Apply horizontal analysis to evaluate trends in revenue and profit.
Apply vertical analysis to assess the efficiency of Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) relative to Total Sales.

projects.title: Portfolio Projects
projects.all_projects_desc: A compilation of finance and data analysis case studies, ranging from dashboard creation to auditing pipelines.

financial_dashboard.title: Project 1
financial_dashboard.problem: Analyzing corporate financial data across multiple years is typically slow and spreadsheet-heavy, making it difficult for management to quickly spot key cash flow bottlenecks and margin shifts.
financial_dashboard.solution: Built a unified data model using Power Query to ingest multi-year corporate financial statements. Programmed custom Power BI DAX formulas to calculate financial ratios (liquidity, profitability, leverage) and designed an interactive dashboard showcasing margins and cash flow trends.
financial_dashboard.impact: Provided executives with instant, visual access to critical financial health indicators, reducing report preparation time and speeding up trend analysis.

data_cleaning.title: Project 2
data_cleaning.problem: Raw transactional data exported from legacy banking and accounting systems is frequently corrupted with trailing whitespace, duplicate records, incorrect formats, and misaligned cell structures.
data_cleaning.solution: Designed a robust, automated data auditing template in Microsoft Excel using Power Query. Created automatic data validation routines to isolate anomalies, correct text cases, and align dates without manual editing.
data_cleaning.impact: Minimized data preparation errors, eliminated manual checking, and prepared 100% clean datasets for reporting and analytics.

budgeting_tool.title: Project 3
budgeting_tool.problem: Traditional budgeting spreadsheets require manual entry for forecasting and lack proactive warnings for budget overruns, increasing the risk of cash shortages.
budgeting_tool.solution: Developed a custom Google Sheets forecasting model using Excel VBA/Google Apps Script. Embedded conditional formulas to trigger alerts when department expenditures exceeded 85% of allocated funds.
budgeting_tool.impact: Enabled real-time budget tracking, resulting in fewer budget overruns and more accurate forecasting of upcoming monthly runway.
